description_long: This is a white ceramic coffee cup with a rounded body and a small, circular handle attached to one side. The cup sits on a matching saucer, which is slightly larger in diameter and features a subtle rim. On one side of the cup, there is a visible brown logo with the text 'daines caffè', indicating branding. The surface of both the cup and saucer appears smooth and glossy, typical of glazed ceramic. The cup is open at the top, designed to hold liquids, and the interior is also white. There are no visible decorative patterns aside from the logo, and the cup does not have a lid.
description: A white ceramic coffee cup with a handle and saucer, featuring a brown logo on one side and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cup and saucer, with the handle and logo not visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the handle and the brown 'daines caffè' logo prominently on the cup.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the handle from behind, with part of the logo barely visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the handle visible but no logo or branding in sight.
